questions.question: Which of the following options explains the variation in temperature between coastal and interior parts of India?
Which of the following mass movements occurs when saturated soil and debris flow down a slope during heavy rainfall?
What type of rocks mainly compose the Peninsular Plateau of India?
questions.option_1: Layers of limestone and sandstone from marine origin
questions.option_2: Young sedimentary rocks formed in coastal plains
questions.option_3: Old crystalline, igneous and metamorphic rocks
questions.option_4: Recent volcanic lava deposits from plate margins
